name: ALLENS FANTALES 160G
description:
ALLEN'S FANTALES BAG 160G

Tantalise your senses with ALLEN'S Fantales smooth and velvety caramel centre, generously coated in milk chocolate. • ALLEN'S has been a little bit of fun since 1891• Recycle me! Return your wrappers in store through REDcycle. • Proudly made in our Australian factory, in Campbellfield, Victoria. Suitable for vegetarians.

MADE IN AUSTRALIA

Ingredients

Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Sweetened Condensed Milk , Vegetable Fat Emulsifiers (Sorbitan Tristearate, Soy Lecithin), Milk Solids, Invert Sugar, Cocoa^, Salt, Emulsifier ( Soy Lecithin), Flavour. Contains Milk, Soy. May Contain Tree Nuts. Product Contains 73% Caramel and 27% Compound Chocolate. ^Rainforest Alliance Certified Cocoa. Find Out More at Ra. Org. &Quot;To Be Written at the End of the Ingredient List&Quot;
